title: cistanche lutea subsp. compacta
intro: Cistanche lutea subsp. compacta, also known as a type of desert ginseng, is a perennial plant native to the deserts of Central Asia and China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cistanche lutea subsp. compacta include improving immune function, reducing fatigue and stress, and potentially alleviating symptoms of anemia and insomnia. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction, capsule, or powder, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
